title: Murder Ballads: How to Make It in Rock 'n' Roll
original_title: Murder Ballads: How to Make It in Rock 'n' Roll
overview: The rapid rise and violent fall of rock band Stack of Corpses whose attempt to jump start their career by stealing another singer’s song ends up with bloody and unexpected consequences. Told through 6 chapters of the band's life.
